hasMore.description: Whether more items are available. Bindable.

loading.description: Whether a load is in progress. Bindable.

rootMargin.description: rootMargin passed to IntersectionObserver. Captured at attachment time.

buttonLabel.description: Visible label for the load-more button.

retryLabel.description: Visible label for the retry button after a load error.

endOfListMessage.description: Politely announced when the end of the list is reached.

maxRetries.description: Maximum consecutive sentinel-triggered requests before auto-loading pauses.

unsupportedProps.name: onError
unsupportedProps.description: Notified when onloadmore throws or rejects.

unsupportedProps.name: onloadmore
unsupportedProps.description: Called when the next page should be loaded. Caller flips `loading` and `hasMore`.

unsupportedProps.name: root
unsupportedProps.description:
Scroll container the sentinel is observed within. Pass the scrollable
ancestor element when the list scrolls inside a container rather than the
viewport. `null`/omitted observes against the viewport. Captured at
attachment time.
